next_steps: Permanent section histopathology with specialized stains (GMS, AFB, Gram, PAS)
Immunohistochemistry panel (CD20, CD3, CD68, GFAP, Ki-67, EBV-encoded RNA)
Microbiological culture of biopsy tissue for bacteria, fungi, mycobacteria, and Nocardia
CSF analysis including cytology, flow cytometry, and broad-range PCR for opportunistic infections
Systemic evaluation with Whole-Body PET/CT or CT chest/abdomen/pelvis
Consultation with Infectious Disease and Neurology regarding potential paradoxical treatment response or alternate immunosuppression modulation
